_comment: A2A (Agent-to-Agent) Protocol Agent Card — Google's open protocol for agent interoperability
name: FrootAI Architecture Agent
description: AI architecture knowledge agent that helps infrastructure and platform teams design, deploy, and operate AI solutions. Provides 18 FROOT knowledge modules, 200+ AI terms, model recommendations, cost estimates, and guided build→review→tune workflows.

skills.name: FROOT Knowledge Query
skills.description: Search and retrieve AI architecture knowledge across 18 modules and 200+ terms

skills.name: AI Model Advisor
skills.description: Compare Azure OpenAI models, estimate costs, recommend the right model for a use case

skills.name: Solution Architecture Guide
skills.description: Guide through 20 pre-packaged solution plays with DevKit + TuneKit configurations

skills.name: Build → Review → Tune Workflow
skills.description: Three-agent chain: Builder creates, Reviewer validates, Tuner optimizes for production

authentication._comment: FrootAI MCP is open source — no authentication required for read-only knowledge queries. Azure-deployed instances can add Managed Identity auth.
